name: California CSLB Master List of Licensed Contractors
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official data portal before relying on freshness assumptions
knownExclusions: Exact source coverage, file contents, and exclusions must be confirmed against official CSLB documentation before adapter implementation.
This source entry does not yet model companion files such as personnel, bond, or workers' compensation data.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented yet. Any future download support should be opt-in and should respect official data portal guidance.
publicRecordsNotes: Official public-record source metadata only. Generated dataset redistribution is not assumed to be allowed.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: CSLB describes downloadable master-list data and companion files on its public data portal. No adapter or fixture is implemented yet.
researchNotes: Treat this as registry metadata only until the master-list file shape, companion files, and redistribution posture are reviewed in detail.
maintainerNotes: Only a source-registry entry exists in v0.1; no California adapter logic is implemented.
